parameters.text:
=🦷 Bright Smile Dental Clinic  Thank you for calling us!
✅  We've received your appointment request: 📋 {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.summary }}  Our team will call you back shortly to confirm. Please arrive 10 minutes early and bring a valid ID. 
😊  — Bright Smile Dental Clinic

call.transcript:
Agent: Hi, thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental Clinic! Our team is unavailable right now — I'm Sarah, an AI assistant. I'll take your details and we'll call you right back. 
User: Hi. I'd like to book a appointment My name is John Smith. My number is zero zero nine zero one two three four five six seven eight. I'd like a cleaning. Next to two day afternoon works for me. 
Agent: Thank you, John. Just to confirm, your phone number is 009012345678, and you're interested in a cleaning. You'd prefer an appointment two days from now in the afternoon. Is that correct?
User: That's correct. Thank you. 
Agent: Thank you, John. We've got your details: John Smith, 009012345678, cleaning, preferred in two days in the afternoon. Someone from our team will call you back shortly to confirm your appointment. Have a great day!

call_analysis.call_summary: The user, John Smith, called Bright Smile Dental Clinic to book a cleaning appointment for two days from now in the afternoon.
